title: Alex's Caves: Enriched
description: An addon for Alex's Caves that changes how you obtain and craft nuclear bombs, as well as improving the effects of nukes on the environment.
body:
An addon for Alex's Caves that changes how you obtain and craft nuclear bombs, as well as improving the effects of nukes on the environment. > **WARNING:** It is recommended to **turn OFF item drops from the nuke** in Alex's Caves configs! Also setting the nuke radius in Alex's Caves to `6` or higher is recommended—the explosions have been optimized for larger radii. **Dependencies:** Citadel, Patchouli, Cloth Config, Kotlin For Forge, and [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves) (of course) --- To get started, craft a guidebook using a book and `alexscaves:uranium` (Requires Patchouli). There is also `EMI` support for the new recipes and in-world block transmutations.   **This mod adds:**
Spoiler - Enriched uranium, rod, block - Overhauled nuclear explosion - Uranium enrichment process - Rocket launcher and rocket types - Uranium arrow - Uranium candy - New types of nukes (Mini-nuke, Neutron bomb, Black hole bomb) - Nuka Cola - Raygun MkII (And gamma variant) - Flamethrower - Railgun
How to enrich uranium:
Spoiler Smelt uranium blocks in an Alex's Caves nuclear furnace to get a *Block of Salted Uranium*. Then put that block in a *Centrifuge* and wait (will take a while). Smelting uranium will leak radiation in the surrounding area so get your hazmat suit on to make sure the nuclear furnace doesnt overheat! ![Instructions on assembling the centrifuge: 4 centrifuge tops on a centrifuge base, then power the base. Each slot has independent 1/72000 chance of enrichment. Comparator output can be taken out of bottom block for fullness of output](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37bfcaf50e28c093e2a4d21b4836cbbf4d564349.jpeg)
Server side performance settings:
Spoiler Note explosions have been optimized compared to Alex's Caves. For weaker hardware, you can try the following settings, in order of greatest to least impact: - Turn off "Create glowing irradiated air" in nuclear explosion config (glowing air may cause light updates and significantly increased memory usage) - Reduce explosion radii for neutron bomb, black hole bomb, mini-nuke (nuke follows Alex's Caves) - Set effect cloud duration to 0 in nuclear explosion config
You may use this in modpacks! ## Credits: - Bowserinator: code and some programmer art - Xenonomous: art and models - Auri: code - AlexModGuy: original Alex's Caves mod
